claimText: At UNSW, the unauthorised or unacknowledged use of AI in assessments is classified as cheating and considered student misconduct under the Code of Conduct and Values.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The unauthorised or unacknowledged use of AI in assessments is a form of cheating and is considered to be student misconduct at UNSW under the current Code of Conduct and Values.

citation.citationTitle: Using AI in university | Current Students – UNSW Sydney
